sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n62969" key="lhsi/mbrotos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λησίμβροτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">λήθω, βροτός</etym>) <sense id="n62969.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">taking men unawares, cheat, thief,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">h.Merc.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">339</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
